---
description: Verified CrowdSec v1.7.3 → v1.7.8 upgrade facts for the itsUP crowdsec image pin — no breaking changes, chunked decision-stream default, WAF/AppSec hardening, Alpine 3.23 base, and unchanged LAPI/bouncer API compatibility.
---

# CrowdSec v1.7.8 — Upgrade Notes (v1.7.3 → v1.7.8)

Curated from the official release notes
(`github.com/crowdsecurity/crowdsec/releases/tag/v1.7.8`, read 2026-07-21),
for the itsUP crowdsec image pin.

## Compatibility

- No breaking changes and no migration steps documented across
  v1.7.3 → v1.7.8. LAPI and bouncer API compatibility unchanged — the
  Traefik bouncer plugin's LAPI contract (`cscli bouncers add` API keys,
  decision queries) is unaffected.
- Decision stream switched to chunked transfer by default — a transport-level
  performance change, transparent to stream/live bouncer clients.

## Hardening and fixes carried

- AppSec/WAF: OpenAPI schema validation for WAF configs, request body size
  limits, simplified `appsec-config` option (relevant to itsUP's
  `crowdsecAppsecEnabled: true` middleware options).
- LAPI enforces a maximum decompression body size.
- Alert creation uses a single database transaction; database indexes added.
- Docker image base upgraded to Alpine 3.23; 34 Go module dependency updates.

## Sources

- https://github.com/crowdsecurity/crowdsec/releases/tag/v1.7.8
